notes.dp: You get 2 DP in 1,000pt games and 3 DP at 2,000pts. Detachment Points costs will be in the Munitorum Field Manual.
notes.isNew: Detachments marked isNew:true are brand new in 11th edition
notes.enhancements: Pendiente: agregar campo opcional "enhancements": [{ "name": string, "cost": number, "restriction"?: string }] por detachment cuando se confirmen los costos reales desde mfm.warhammer-community.com/en. Tipo ya definido como DetachmentEnhancement en src/data/types.ts.

enhancements.name: Deeds that Speak to the Masses
